source: C/S T.018 Rev 7, Appendix C (GNSS Encoded Location Protocol)
description: Reference GNSS encodings. Bit strings are MSB-first. Position is bits 44-90 of the 202-bit main field; degrees and sign flags are integer, decimal fractions use 15-bit weighted encoding.

bit_layout.encoding_method: Integral Number Conversion Method, Appendix C.5

examples.description: Appendix C example: 35 46.295' N => 35.77158 degrees => fractional 0.77158 * 32768 = 25283.13 => 25283
